[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011001 3
1 1111000 4
2 1001100 3
3 1000000 1
4 1100110 4
5 0100010 2
6 1100110 4
7 1111111 a

01 10 0100000 1
12 21 1100100 3
23 32 1111111 a match 7
34 43 1100001 3
45 54 0110100 3
56 65 0001100 2
67 76 0000100 1
70 07 1100110 4 match 4 6

02 20 1000100 2
13 31 0011011 4
24 42 0011110 4
35 53 1010101 4
46 64 0111000 3
57 75 0001000 1
60 06 1100010 3
71 17 1000110 3

03 30 0111011 5
14 41 1111010 5
25 52 0101010 3
36 63 1011001 4
47 74 0111100 4
50 05 1101110 5
61 16 1000010 2
72 27 0100010 2 match 5

04 40 1011010 4
15 51 1001110 4
26 62 0100110 3
37 73 1011101 5
